glosses.yue: 令人厭倦; 令人疲累
glosses.ja: 疲れさせる; 退屈させる

translations.vi: Những quảng cáo này làm tôi chán.
translations.sv: Den här reklamen tråkar ut mig.
translations.ja: この広告にはうんざりだ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner in plural, specifying the noun 'pubs'; forms the subject NP.
Common noun (plural, informal for 'publicité'); head of the subject; agrees in number with the verb.
1st-person singular clitic object pronoun placed before the verb; direct object of 'lassent'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ces pubs' as subject; means 'wear out/bore'.

sentences.target: Je me lasse des mêmes séries.

translations.fr: Je me lasse des mêmes séries.
translations.en: I'm getting tired of the same shows.
translations.es: Me estoy cansando de las mismas series.
translations.de: Ich habe die gleichen Serien satt.
translations.it: Mi sto stufando delle solite serie.
translations.yue: 我對同一啲劇集感到厭倦。
translations.ru: Мне надоели одни и те же сериалы.
translations.pt: Estou ficando cansado das mesmas séries.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chán những bộ phim lặp đi lặp lại.
translations.nl: Ik ben de steeds dezelfde series zat.
translations.uk: Мені набридають одні й ті самі серіали.
translations.hi: मैं वही धारावाहिक देखकर ऊब रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Έχω αρχίσει να βαριέμαι τις ίδιες σειρές.
translations.nb: Jeg begynner å bli lei av de samme seriene.
translations.id: Aku mulai bosan dengan serial yang itu-itu saja.
translations.sv: Jag börjar tröttna på samma serier.
translations.ro: Încep să mă satur de aceleași seriale.
translations.da: Jeg er ved at blive træt af de samme serier.
translations.ja: 同じような番組に飽きてきた。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'lasse'.
1st-person singular reflexive clitic pronoun; part of the pronominal construction 'se lasser de'.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; pronominal use ('se lasser de') meaning 'grow tired of'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'les' (de + les); introduces the complement of 'se lasser'.
Adjective in plural, modifying 'séries'; marks identity ('the same').
Common noun in plural; object of the preposition 'des' in the prepositional complement.

sentences.target: Tu me lasses avec tes excuses.

translations.fr: Tu me lasses avec tes excuses.
translations.en: You bore me with your excuses.
translations.de: Du langweilst mich mit deinen Ausreden.
translations.it: Mi stufi con le tue scuse.
translations.pt: Você me cansa com suas desculpas.
translations.he: אתה מעייף אותי עם התירוצים שלך.
translations.vi: Những lời bao biện của bạn làm tôi chán.
translations.nl: Je verveelt me met je smoesjes.
translations.hi: तुम अपने बहानों से मुझे उबाते हो.
translations.el: Με κουράζεις με τις δικαιολογίες σου.
translations.nb: Du kjeder meg med unnskyldningene dine.
translations.sv: Du tråkar ut mig med dina ursäkter.
translations.da: Du keder mig med dine undskyldninger.
translations.ja: 君の言い訳にはうんざりだ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'lasses'.
1st-person singular clitic object pronoun before the verb; direct object of 'lasses'.
Finite verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; means 'you bore/tire (someone)'.
Preposition introducing the manner/instrumental complement 'tes excuses'.
2nd-person singular possessive determiner in plural; modifies 'excuses'.
Common noun in plural; complement of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Ce boulot finit par me lasser.

translations.fr: Ce boulot finit par me lasser.
translations.en: This job ends up boring me.
translations.de: Dieser Job langweilt mich mit der Zeit.
translations.zh-Hans: 这份工作最终让我厌倦。
translations.ru: Со временем эта работа мне надоедает.
translations.he: עם הזמן העבודה הזאת משעממת אותי.
translations.vi: Công việc này cuối cùng cũng khiến tôi chán.
translations.nl: Uiteindelijk gaat deze baan me vervelen.
translations.uk: З часом ця робота мені набридає.
translations.hi: धीरे-धीरे यह नौकरी मुझे उबाने लगती है.
translations.pl: Ta praca z czasem zaczyna mnie nudzić.
translations.el: Με τον καιρό αυτή η δουλειά με κουράζει.
translations.nb: Etter hvert begynner denne jobben å kjede meg.
translations.id: Pekerjaan ini pada akhirnya membuat saya bosan.
translations.sv: Med tiden börjar det här jobbet tråka ut mig.
translations.ro: Cu timpul, munca asta ajunge să με πlictisească.
translations.cs: Časem mě ta práce začne nudit.
translations.da: Med tiden begynder dette job at kede mig.
translations.fi: Ajan myötä tämä työ alkaa kyllästyttää minua.
translations.ja: この仕事は時間が経つと飽きてくる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner specifying 'boulot'; forms the subject NP.
Common noun (colloquial), singular; head of the subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main verb of the clause.
Preposition in the construction 'finir par + infinitif', marking eventual outcome ('ends up by').
1st-person singular clitic object pronoun; object of the infinitive 'lasser'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'finir par'; expresses the resulting action affecting 'me'.
